programmes.show_description: From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
They say music goes in cycles - well for a period in the 70s we decided to celebrate all things 50s! Showaddywaddy's Dave Bartram has hits from Alvin Stardust, Mud, Darts & Grease!

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
These 25 stars of rock and pop during the '70s are no longer with us. But the music from names like McVie, Bowie, Bolan, Marley, Mercury, Lennon and Presley will live on forever.
David Hamilton with 30 famous songs, 3 from every year. Each was a million selling single or from a million-selling album, either in the UK or around the world!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?

programmes.show_name: Me & You & A Dog Named Boo! Top 12
programmes.show_description: From a 'Horse With No Name' to a 'Dog Named Boo' - 12 songs about animals, or by artists with animal connections. Pretty contrived but quite good fun.
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Tracks with big TV connections! Could be theme tunes, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show.
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
A 10 hour pentathlon of power - a deafening decade of hits! 130 songs to turn up loud, presented by the only man who can - Bam!
We party into summertime with another MASSIVE 70s singalong session. We recommend you ignore the lost hour, and party all night!
Mark Goodier with 1971's big music award winners. Who was 'Best Newcomer' at the Grammys, and which comedian got the coveted UK Christmas Number 1?
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Feelgood sunshine hits from a colourful decade - the 1970s! Flares and mini-skirts at the ready?
Songs you really like but are a bit too embarrassed to admit. Don't worry, we're all in the same boat here & Pat urges you to try to have a little less shame in your musical game!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Exclusive to NOW 70s, Mark Goodier brings this marathon 100 countdown of the decade's biggest acts, based on global record sales, live concert takings, and awards. So who's No.1?
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog and Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC and Queen.
